name: Moussaka - a Greek Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown half a clove of garlic in vegetable oil in a skillet. Discard the garlic.
2. Brown the meat in the oil; add bay leaf and sage. Stir to break up the meat.
3. Add salt and pepper.
4. Remove the meat and brown the remaining sliced garlic in drippings.
5. Remove the garlic.
6. Add potatoes and brown, stirring often.
7. Add onion and 2 teaspoons of salt.
8. Arrange layers of potato mixture, meat, and tomatoes in a 2-1/2 quart casserole.
9. Top with additional layers of tomato and potato.
10. Sprinkle with paprika.
11. Top with grated cheese.
12. Bake at 375 degrees for 1 hour or until done.
